description_long: This skateboard features a uniquely perforated deck with a series of oval and circular cutouts distributed across its surface, giving it a lightweight and modern appearance. The deck is a muted brown color and appears to be made from a composite or reinforced plastic material, with no visible graphics or branding. The board is mounted on two sets of black wheels, which are attached via standard trucks that are mostly hidden from view. The overall shape of the deck is slightly fish-tailed at the rear, with a rounded nose and a flat, low profile. The surface of the deck is textured, likely to provide grip in the absence of traditional grip tape. The minimalist design and lack of adornment suggest a utilitarian, urban-oriented skateboard suitable for cruising or commuting.
description: A brown, perforated skateboard with a fish-tail rear, black wheels, and a textured, grip-enhancing deck. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible graphics or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, perforated deck pattern, and two black wheels partially visible beneath.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the flat, low deck, fish-tail rear, and the full length of the black wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fish-tail shape, perforated pattern, and the rear wheels beneath the deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the flat deck, perforations, and black wheels, with the fish-tail rear visible.
attribute_wheel_type: cruiser, black, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, mostly hidden, likely metal, no visible branding
